steps.title: Read the value of y at x = 10
steps.content: The variable $y$ represents the total distance, in meters, Maksim had walked since leaving the water fountain, and $x$ is the time in minutes after he left. Read the graph at $x = 10$ minutes: the line reaches $y = 600$ meters.

steps.title: Interpret the value as distance walked
steps.content: Since $y$ already measures the distance Maksim walked after leaving the fountain, the value at $x = 10$ is the distance walked during those 10 minutes: $600$ meters. The answer is 600.
